title: CACertificate
description: A CA certificate object represents a trusted CA. These objects are used by Kong to verify the validity of a client or server certificate.

cert.description: PEM-encoded public certificate of the CA.

cert_digest.description: SHA256 hex digest of the public certificate. This field is read-only and it cannot be set by the caller, the value is automatically computed.

created_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was created.

id.description: A string representing a UUID (universally unique identifier).

tags.description: An optional set of strings associated with the Certificate for grouping and filtering.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was last updated.
